claude-sonnet-4.5.natural_language: Show me all sales with product names
claude-sonnet-4.5.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    fis.SalesOrderNumber,
    fis.SalesOrderLineNumber,
    fis.OrderDate,
    p.EnglishProductName,
    fis.OrderQuantity,
    fis.UnitPrice,
    fis.SalesAmount,
    fis.TaxAmt,
    fis.Freight
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales fis
INNER JOIN dbo.DimProduct p ON fis.ProductKey = p.ProductKey

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    frs.SalesOrderNumber,
    frs.SalesOrderLineNumber,
    frs.OrderDate,
    p.EnglishProductName,
    frs.OrderQuantity,
    frs.UnitPrice,
    frs.SalesAmount,
    frs.TaxAmt,
    frs.Freight
FROM dbo.FactResellerSales frs
INNER JOIN dbo.DimProduct p ON frs.ProductKey = p.ProductKey

claude-sonnet-4.5.natural_language: List all orders with customer names and product names
claude-sonnet-4.5.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    fis.SalesOrderNumber,
    fis.SalesOrderLineNumber,
    dc.FirstName,
    dc.LastName,
    dp.EnglishProductName,
    fis.OrderDate,
    fis.OrderQuantity,
    fis.SalesAmount
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales fis
INNER JOIN dbo.DimCustomer dc ON fis.CustomerKey = dc.CustomerKey
INNER JOIN dbo.DimProduct dp ON fis.ProductKey = dp.ProductKey

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    frs.SalesOrderNumber,
    frs.SalesOrderLineNumber,
    dr.ResellerName AS FirstName,
    '' AS LastName,
    dp.EnglishProductName,
    frs.OrderDate,
    frs.OrderQuantity,
    frs.SalesAmount
FROM dbo.FactResellerSales frs
INNER JOIN dbo.DimReseller dr ON frs.ResellerKey = dr.ResellerKey
INNER JOIN dbo.DimProduct dp ON frs.ProductKey = dp.ProductKey
ORDER BY SalesOrderNumber, SalesOrderLineNumber;

claude-sonnet-4.5.natural_language: Show me sales by product category
claude-sonnet-4.5.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    pc.EnglishProductCategoryName AS ProductCategory,
    SUM(fis.SalesAmount) AS TotalSales
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales fis
INNER JOIN dbo.DimProduct p ON fis.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
INNER JOIN dbo.DimProductSubcategory ps ON p.ProductSubcategoryKey = ps.ProductSubcategoryKey
INNER JOIN dbo.DimProductCategory pc ON ps.ProductCategoryKey = pc.ProductCategoryKey
GROUP BY pc.EnglishProductCategoryName
ORDER BY TotalSales DESC

claude-sonnet-4.5.natural_language: Show me sales from the year 2023
claude-sonnet-4.5.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    fis.SalesOrderNumber,
    fis.SalesOrderLineNumber,
    fis.OrderDate,
    fis.SalesAmount,
    fis.OrderQuantity,
    fis.UnitPrice,
    p.EnglishProductName,
    c.FirstName,
    c.LastName
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales fis
INNER JOIN dbo.DimDate d ON fis.OrderDateKey = d.DateKey
INNER JOIN dbo.DimProduct p ON fis.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
INNER JOIN dbo.DimCustomer c ON fis.CustomerKey = c.CustomerKey
WHERE d.CalendarYear = 2023

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    frs.SalesOrderNumber,
    frs.SalesOrderLineNumber,
    frs.OrderDate,
    frs.SalesAmount,
    frs.OrderQuantity,
    frs.UnitPrice,
    p.EnglishProductName,
    r.ResellerName AS FirstName,
    '' AS LastName
FROM dbo.FactResellerSales frs
INNER JOIN dbo.DimDate d ON frs.OrderDateKey = d.DateKey
INNER JOIN dbo.DimProduct p ON frs.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
INNER JOIN dbo.DimReseller r ON frs.ResellerKey = r.ResellerKey
WHERE d.CalendarYear = 2023
ORDER BY OrderDate;

claude-sonnet-4.5.natural_language: Compare sales between 2023 and 2024 by quarter
claude-sonnet-4.5.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    d.CalendarYear,
    d.CalendarQuarter,
    SUM(fis.SalesAmount) AS TotalInternetSales,
    SUM(frs.SalesAmount) AS TotalResellerSales,
    SUM(fis.SalesAmount) + SUM(frs.SalesAmount) AS TotalSales
FROM dbo.DimDate d
LEFT JOIN dbo.FactInternetSales fis ON d.DateKey = fis.OrderDateKey
LEFT JOIN dbo.FactResellerSales frs ON d.DateKey = frs.OrderDateKey
WHERE d.CalendarYear IN (2023, 2024)
GROUP BY d.CalendarYear, d.CalendarQuarter
ORDER BY d.CalendarYear, d.CalendarQuarter;

claude-sonnet-4.5.natural_language: Show me the profit margin by product subcategory
claude-sonnet-4.5.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    ps.EnglishProductSubcategoryName,
    SUM(fis.SalesAmount) AS TotalSales,
    SUM(fis.TotalProductCost) AS TotalCost,
    SUM(fis.SalesAmount - fis.TotalProductCost) AS TotalProfit,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(fis.SalesAmount) > 0 
        THEN (SUM(fis.SalesAmount - fis.TotalProductCost) / SUM(fis.SalesAmount)) * 100
        ELSE 0 
    END AS ProfitMarginPercentage
FROM dbo.FactInternetSales fis
INNER JOIN dbo.DimProduct p ON fis.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
INNER JOIN dbo.DimProductSubcategory ps ON p.ProductSubcategoryKey = ps.ProductSubcategoryKey
GROUP BY ps.EnglishProductSubcategoryName
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    ps.EnglishProductSubcategoryName,
    SUM(frs.SalesAmount) AS TotalSales,
    SUM(frs.TotalProductCost) AS TotalCost,
    SUM(frs.SalesAmount - frs.TotalProductCost) AS TotalProfit,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(frs.SalesAmount) > 0 
        THEN (SUM(frs.SalesAmount - frs.TotalProductCost) / SUM(frs.SalesAmount)) * 100
        ELSE 0 
    END AS ProfitMarginPercentage
FROM dbo.FactResellerSales frs
INNER JOIN dbo.DimProduct p ON frs.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
INNER JOIN dbo.DimProductSubcategory ps ON p.ProductSubcategoryKey = ps.ProductSubcategoryKey
GROUP BY ps.EnglishProductSubcategoryName

gpt-4.1.natural_language: Compare sales between 2023 and 2024 by quarter
gpt-4.1.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    YEAR(dbo.DimDate.FullDateAlternateKey) AS SalesYear,
    dbo.DimDate.CalendarQuarter AS Quarter,
    SUM(dbo.FactInternetSales.SalesAmount) AS TotalSales
FROM 
    dbo.FactInternetSales
JOIN 
    dbo.DimDate ON dbo.FactInternetSales.OrderDateKey = dbo.DimDate.DateKey
WHERE 
    YEAR(dbo.DimDate.FullDateAlternateKey) IN (2023, 2024)
GROUP BY 
    YEAR(dbo.DimDate.FullDateAlternateKey),
    dbo.DimDate.CalendarQuarter
ORDER BY 
    SalesYear,
    Quarter;

gpt-4.1.natural_language: Show me the profit margin by product subcategory
gpt-4.1.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    dbo.DimProductSubcategory.EnglishProductSubcategoryName,
    SUM(dbo.FactInternetSales.SalesAmount - dbo.FactInternetSales.TotalProductCost) AS TotalProfit,
    SUM(dbo.FactInternetSales.SalesAmount) AS TotalSales,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(dbo.FactInternetSales.SalesAmount) = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE SUM(dbo.FactInternetSales.SalesAmount - dbo.FactInternetSales.TotalProductCost) / SUM(dbo.FactInternetSales.SalesAmount)
    END AS ProfitMargin
FROM 
    dbo.FactInternetSales
JOIN 
    dbo.DimProduct 
    ON dbo.FactInternetSales.ProductKey = dbo.DimProduct.ProductKey
JOIN 
    dbo.DimProductSubcategory 
    ON dbo.DimProduct.ProductSubcategoryKey = dbo.DimProductSubcategory.ProductSubcategoryKey
GROUP BY 
    dbo.DimProductSubcategory.EnglishProductSubcategoryName
